#[non_exhaustive] pub enum zenpredict_bake::BakeError
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::BiasLengthMismatch
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::BiasLengthMismatch::expected: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::BiasLengthMismatch::got: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::BiasLengthMismatch::layer: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::EmptyLayers
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureBoundsLengthMismatch
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureBoundsLengthMismatch::expected: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureBoundsLengthMismatch::got: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureOrderLengthMismatch
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureOrderLengthMismatch::expected: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureOrderLengthMismatch::got: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamArityMismatch
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamArityMismatch::expected: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamArityMismatch::feature_index: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamArityMismatch::got: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamArityMismatch::transform: &'static str
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamInvalid
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformParamInvalid::feature_index: usize

pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::FeatureTransformsLenMismatch::got: usize

pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::InvalidPermutation::what: &'static str
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::LayerDimMismatch
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::LayerDimMismatch::expected_in: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::LayerDimMismatch::got_in: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::LayerDimMismatch::layer: usize
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::MetadataKeyEmpty
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::MetadataKeyTooLong
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::MetadataKeyTooLong::len: usize

pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::OutputOrderLengthMismatch::got: usize

pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::OutputSpecDiscreteOutOfRange::offset: u32

pub zenpredict_bake::BakeError::OutputSpecsLengthMismatch::got: usize

pub struct zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest<'a>
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::compressed: bool
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::discrete_sets: &'a [f32]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::feature_bounds: &'a [zenpredict::bounds::FeatureBound]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::feature_order: core::option::Option<&'a [u32]>
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::flags: u16
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::hu_permutations: core::option::Option<&'a [&'a [u32]]>
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::layers: &'a [zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeLayer<'a>]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::metadata: &'a [zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeMetadataEntry<'a>]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::output_order: core::option::Option<&'a [u32]>
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::output_specs: &'a [zenpredict::output_spec::OutputSpec]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::scaler_mean: &'a [f32]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::scaler_scale: &'a [f32]
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::schema_hash: u64
pub zenpredict_bake::BakeRequest::sparse_overrides: &'a [zenpredict::output_spec::SparseOverride]
impl<'a> zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>
pub fn zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>::builder(u64, u16, &'a [f32], &'a [f32], &'a [zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeLayer<'a>]) -> zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequestBuilder<'a>
pub fn zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>::new(u64, u16, &'a [f32], &'a [f32], &'a [zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeLayer<'a>]) -> Self

impl<'a> core::marker::Send for zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Sync for zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Unpin for zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>

impl<'a> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenpredict_bake::composer::BakeRequest<'a>
pub struct zenpredict_bake::BakeRequestBuilder<'a>
